channel.title: Retype News by RSS
channel.description: Latest updates, announcements, and articles from Retype

item.title: What's New in Retype v4.1
item.description: Retype v4.1 has been primarily a community-driven release shaped by suggestions and feedback from Retype users. A huge thank you to the Retype community
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: Self-hosting Obsidian Vault with Retype
item.description: If you use Obsidian, chances are you’ve thought about publishing your vault online. Maybe it’s a personal digital garden, a team knowledge base, or project
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: What's New in Retype v4.0
item.description: Retype v4.0 is here! This major version release brings powerful new components, expanded templating capabilities, and a complete upgrade of all internal
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: What's New in Retype v3.12
item.description: Retype v3.12 brings powerful new features for content discovery, visual design, and theme customization. This release introduces the Backlinks component
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: What's New in Retype v3.11
item.description: Retype v3.11 puts you in control of your project's visual identity, while keeping everything fast, clean, and easy to use. This release brings Pro-level
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: What's New in Retype v3.10
item.description: We're excited to share the latest release of Retype, packed with features that make documentation more flexible and powerful. This release focuses on
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: New GitHub Pages Community Key
item.description: All projects should have access to professional-grade documentation, no matter their budget. Starting today, the Retype Pro Community Key for GitHub Pages
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: What's New in Retype v3.9
item.description: Retype v3.9 brings improvements to callout components, broader syntax features to support other systems, enhanced image handling, and better print
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: What's New in Retype v3.8
item.description: Retype v3.8 introduces powerful new linking capabilities, enhanced search functionality, and improved content management features. This release focuses on
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)
